testimonials.title: Parent Stories
testimonials.description: Actual feedback from our growing iMath family.

amira.name: Mrs. Amira H.
amira.content: iMath has completely transformed my daughter's relationship with numbers. She no longer fears calculations; she actually looks forward to her sessions!

omar.name: Mr. Omar F.

pricing.title: Flexible Learning Plans
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your family's schedule, goals, and location.
pricing.packageLabel: {months, plural, one {# Month Package} other {# Months Package}}
pricing.manualOverrideHint: You can override the detected country if a VPN or travel location is affecting the pricing context.

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.description: Everything you need to know about starting your iMath journey.

ages.question: What ages do you support?
ages.answer: Our core Mental Math program is designed for ages 5-14, where children benefit most from structured number training and concentration building.

format.question: Are the sessions 1:1 or in groups?
format.answer: All iMath sessions are strictly 1:1. We believe personal focus is the fastest way to build Mental Math accuracy and confidence.

mentalMath.question: What is Mental Math?
mentalMath.answer: Mental Math trains children to calculate quickly and accurately in their heads. It improves number sense, focus, confidence, and speed beyond ordinary homework support.

ucmath.question: What is UCMath and why does it matter?
ucmath.answer: UCMath is a structured Mental Math methodology that develops calculation ability step by step. It gives parents a clearer path than unstructured tutoring because the training is systematic and measurable.

progress.question: How can I track my child's progress?
progress.answer: You'll receive a detailed monthly assessment report covering the student's progress, strengths, and goals for the next month.

schedule.question: Can we change our schedule?
schedule.answer: Yes, we offer flexible rescheduling options via our WhatsApp support team to accommodate your busy family life.

languages.question: Which languages are supported?
languages.answer: Sessions are available in both Arabic and English. We help students build Mental Math confidence in the language they use most comfortably.

finalCta.title: Ready to Transform Your Child's <highlight>Future?</highlight>
finalCta.description: Book a free trial today and let our team recommend the right Mental Math starting point for your child.

footer.description: Helping children build Mental Math speed, focus, and confidence through bilingual 1:1 online sessions and the certified UCMath methodology.

BookingModal.title: Book a Trial and We'll Contact You Quickly
BookingModal.description: Share a few details about your child and preferred schedule. Our team will review the request and follow up with the next available assessment slot.

parentName.label: Parent name
parentName.placeholder: Enter the parent or guardian name

email.label: Email address
email.hint: Optional, but helpful if you prefer email follow-up.

scheduler.description: Choose one date first, then pick a single one-hour time slot.
scheduler.selectDateFirst: Select a date to see available time slots.
scheduler.noTimesAvailable: No time slots are left for that day. Choose another date.

stepper.title: Book Your Free Trial
stepper.description: Move through four short steps to submit a complete and accurate trial request.
stepper.parentDescription: Finish with the parent or guardian contact details so we can confirm the trial.
stepper.studentDescription: Start with the student. We'll use these details to suggest the right Mental Math level.
stepper.reviewDescription: Review everything before you send the request.

experience.advanced: Already doing well, wants to improve further

timezone.label: Detected timezone
timezone.hint: We use this to align the first follow-up and trial scheduling.

pricingContext.label: Pricing context
pricingContext.hint: The selected pricing country and currency are stored with your request so our team can follow up with the right package context.

BookingModal.privacyNote: By submitting this form, you allow iMath to contact you about your trial request using the details you provided.

NotFound.title: Oops! Incomplete Equation
NotFound.description: It seems the page you're searching for is missing from our database. It might have been moved to a different function or deleted forever.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: At iMath, we take your privacy and your child's data security very seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you share with us.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We only collect information necessary to provide our educational services, including: Parent name, student name and age, phone number (for WhatsApp contact), email address, and timezone.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use this data to organize trial sessions, personalize the student's curriculum, and communicate with you regarding session schedules and monthly reports.

protection.title: 3. Data Protection
protection.content: Your data is stored securely using modern encryption technologies. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.description: By using the iMath platform, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions.

sessions.title: 1. Educational Sessions
sessions.content: All sessions at iMath are 1:1 online sessions. We are committed to providing a certified and trained tutor for each student.

cancellation.title: 2. Cancellation and Rescheduling
cancellation.content: At least 24 hours notice must be given if you wish to cancel or reschedule a session to ensure the student's right to a compensation session.

payments.title: 3. Payments
payments.content: Payment packages and transfer details are agreed upon manually via WhatsApp after the successful completion of the trial session.
